episodes.title: Massie says Epstein Files Transparency Act triggered White House alarm
episodes.description:
Rep. Robert Garcia, D-Calif., wants Rep. James Comer, R-Tompkinsville, to arrange for members of the Trump administration to testify before the House Oversight Committee. Comer chairs the committee, which has been reviewing the federal government's investigation of sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. According to a new report from The New York Times, the vice president and other top advisers repeatedly met in the White House Situation Room last year to discuss the public’s demand for Epstein records. Rep. Thomas Massie, R-Crescent Springs, says the reporting shows his push for the release of Epstein records put the White House into a "full-blown panic."

#SpectrumNews #Kentucky #Politics #ThomasMassie #JeffreyEpstein

episodes.title: Holiday havoc unfolds in 'Cult of Love'  | On Stage
episodes.description:
Second Stage’s new play takes a look at the family dynamic during the holidays and how it can quickly become chaotic. The show is called "Cult of Love" and features an all-star cast, including Zachary Quinto, Shailene Woodley, Christopher Lowell and Molly Bernard. They sat down with On Stage host Frank DiLella to share more about the play.
